channel.title: GitHub Cuda Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Cuda in GitHub

item.title: Dao-AILab/causal-conv1d
item.description: Causal depthwise conv1d in CUDA, with a PyTorch interface

item.title: brucefan1983/CUDA-Programming
item.description: Sample codes for my CUDA programming book

item.title: Liu-xiandong/How_to_optimize_in_GPU
item.description: This is a series of GPU optimization topics. Here we will introduce how to optimize the CUDA kernel in detail. I will introduce several basic kernel optimizations, including: elementwise, reduce, sgemv, sgemm, etc. The performance of these kernels is basically at or near the theoretical limit.

item.title: NVIDIA/cub
item.description: [ARCHIVED] Cooperative primitives for CUDA C++. See https://github.com/NVIDIA/cccl

item.title: NVlabs/instant-ngp
item.description: Instant neural graphics primitives: lightning fast NeRF and more

item.title: mit-han-lab/torchsparse
item.description: [MICRO'23, MLSys'22] TorchSparse: Efficient Training and Inference Framework for Sparse Convolution on GPUs.
